series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of results from criminal-records checks (including Rapback checks) conducted by BCII/FBI for applicants and licensees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy converted electronic format. Once machine-readable version is verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Withdrawn/Closed Applications, one year a withdrawal is granted or an application is considered closed Granted Applications, three years expiration of credential Denials/Revocations, three years following date of denial of application or revocation of license, or expiration of applicant''s or licensee''s appeals, whichever is later
